form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (20.25) when fourth over 366m at this track in a Grade 5. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (20.11) over 366m at this track. Has a low draw. Must be included.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 3 for the first time after finishing a 13 length sixth at Q Lakeside (22.41) in a Grade 5. Lines up well in this field.

form.formComment: Form has been strong, including a victory two starts back. Last time out finished 3rd on April 11 over 457m at Q Lakeside behind Mr. Lasso beaten 7 lengths (25.87) in a Grade 5. Going better than form suggests. Don't underestimate.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fourth (19.98) at Q Lakeside over 352m. Others favoured this time.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 390m at Q Lakeside. Others favoured this time.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (20.00) over 352m at Q Lakeside. Has a wide draw to navigate and looks safely held.

form.formComment: Working his way into winning form after his success on January 29 at Q Parklands over 710m. Last start was fourth over 715m in 42.61, behind Wyong Irving. Expected to go very well.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, Last start finished seventh over 366m at this track, beaten 8 lengths. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.
